footer.tagline: The space where beauty meets ritual.

home.heroSubtitle: Your beauty centre and SPA in Prata di Pordenone
home.introTitle: A place that takes care of you.
home.introBody: Kalika Nuovaestetica is the beauty centre and SPA in Prata di Pordenone where care becomes ritual. Every treatment, face, body, massage or SPA journey, is designed around you, because there are no standard solutions. For our treatments we choose SICE eubiotic cosmetics: biocompatible, free from parabens and silicones, formulated to respect the skin and support its natural renewal.
home.worldsEsteticaText: Face and body treatments designed for you, with the Kalika method and eubiotic cosmetics.
home.worldsSpaText: Sensory experiences, rituals from around the world, thermal journeys to find yourself again.
home.featuredSubtitle: Four entry points into the Kalika world.
home.featuredRitualiText: Sensory journeys in a private suite.
home.areaEsteticaText: Targeted treatments to help you always feel your best - cared for in every detail, in harmony with your body and face.
home.areaSpaText: An exclusive space where relaxation turns into a sensory journey through rituals that go beyond the treatment.
home.checkupBody: Every new client starts with a free check-up: a moment dedicated to listening and defining your personalised path. Because there are no standard treatments - only tailored journeys, built around you and your goals.
home.checkupQuote: The bespoke suit for your skin.
home.checkupWaTopic: I'd like to book the free check-up
home.waBody: We’ll recommend the treatment that suits you best, with the time and attention you deserve.
home.giftTitle: A gift that won't be forgotten.
home.giftBody: Gift Cards for beauty treatments, SPA rituals and wellness journeys in Prata di Pordenone. Personalised, digital and available instantly. The perfect gift for someone you love.
home.reviewsSubtitle: Voices from those who chose Kalika.

essenza.heroSubtitle: Where every detail is a choice, and every choice is care.
essenza.chiBody: **Kalika is much more than a beauty centre**: it's the place where you feel welcomed, listened to and looked after with the right attention. Our clients call it a **happy island**: a space where every treatment is chosen together, applied with care for every detail, and designed to deliver real, lasting results.

sabina.title: Sabina Carretta
sabina.bio1: My story begins with a real vocation: **making people feel good**.
sabina.bio2: Always drawn to personal care and to beauty in all its forms, I found my fulfilment in being a beauty therapist — a profession that, for me, has never been just technique, but **listening, relationship and transformation.**
sabina.bio3: My approach is personalised for every client. First of all I **listen**: needs, lifestyle, expectations. Only this way can a treatment be truly effective and never superficial.
sabina.bio4: I've chosen continuous, selective training, because I believe professional growth never stops. **My goal is not to mask a flaw, but to reach the root**: to walk with each person toward a more aware, self-respecting lifestyle, and obtain results that last.
sabina.quote: Because true beauty isn't applied, it's built together.

essenza.eubioticaBody:
We work with Sice: **the Italian Society of Eubiotic Cosmetics, born from the vision of Dr. Enzo Odoardi** — with a simple and revolutionary philosophy: cosmetics should be a true **bio-nourishment for the skin**, fully compatible with its physiology and natural processes.

Sice products are formulated with selected medicinal plants, precious vegetable oils, natural vitamins, trace elements and plant enzymes. **They are free from parabens, mineral oils, silicones and synthetic colourants.** Because everything that comes into contact with the skin should nourish it, not attack it.

The result is cosmetics that dialogue with the skin instead of forcing it: respecting the skin microbiota, supporting natural cell renewal and restoring balance over time. Not a product catalogue, but **a philosophy of conscious care.**
essenza.spaziCabineText: Bright spaces curated in every detail, designed to welcome you in an atmosphere of care and privacy. The place where every face and body treatment comes to life, with full attention to you and your needs.
essenza.spaziSpaText: Thermal journey with sauna, biosauna, Turkish bath, Russian banja and hammam. A journey through heat and steam to purify the body, release tension and restore your balance.
essenza.spaziSuiteText: The heart of our rituals. Our Tepidarium: an exclusive space where warmth, scents and expert hands meet to take you on a sensory journey far from the world. A moment just for you.
essenza.teamSabinaBio: Vision, method, care. Every choice, every treatment, every detail carries her signature.
essenza.teamFrancescaBio: Care, precision and passion in every treatment.

estetica.heroSubtitle: Face, body, hands, feet. Precise care, attentive gesture.
estetica.intro: For us, beauty is a dialogue. Every treatment starts from a skin analysis, a question, a glance. Choose your path.
estetica.downloadBody: Download the updated price list in PDF.

estetica.chooseHelpBody: Write to us on WhatsApp: we'll guide you.

epilazione.title: Hair removal
epilazione.intro: Traditional, Coco Cera, Diode Laser 808: three technologies for every need.
epilazione.laserHowBody: A laser beam targets the follicle, progressively reducing regrowth. The cold-contact head keeps the treatment comfortable.
epilazione.laserSuitableBody: Women and men, on almost all skin phototypes. A free consultation lets us design the best plan for you.

sopracciglia.title: Brows, lashes & make-up
sopracciglia.intro: The gaze as your first signature. Shape, colour, intensity.

reviews.name: Roberta N.
reviews.text: Today, 26.03.26, I came to the beauty centre for a sauna massage with bucketfuls of water! I really needed it, I felt reborn, lighter, my back was so stiff 🙈🙈🙈... I experienced again that feeling of wellbeing and lightness I had been missing for far too long. Thank you to Sabrina for the massage and to the Kalika team for this lovely, regenerating experience.

reviews.name: Fabiana C.
reviews.text: A very beautiful and clean beauty centre. The owner is a unique and fantastic person and I recommend it for her skill and for the help she gives in finding what is best for you, which is no small thing. The employee is very good, well prepared and attentive to every need. If you want to go on a unique, relaxing journey, this is the right place.

reviews.name: Chiara C.
reviews.text: If I could give more than 5 stars, I would without the slightest hesitation. A friend gifted me the Ginger and Chocolate Ritual and calling it simply a treatment would be reductive: it was a true journey. Having had many massages in the past, I can say with certainty that this was the best of my life :) The rituals take place inside the Tepidarium, a magical environment and a completely new experience for me, as I had never tried anything like it before. Sabina and Sabrina are exceptional professionals; they know exactly how to welcome and pamper clients at every single moment. As a finishing touch, after the massage there is the possibility of staying in the relaxation area and enjoying an excellent chocolate herbal tea. A 10/10 experience.
